---
title: "One Dark"
description: "A One Dark theme for terminal components."
---

<ComponentPreview name="theme-showcase" theme="one-dark" hideCode />

## Installation

```bash
npx shadcn@latest add https://termcn.dev/r/theme-one-dark.json
```

## Usage

```tsx
import { ThemeProvider } from "@/components/ui/theme-provider";
import { oneDarkTheme } from "@/lib/terminal-themes/one-dark";
import { Badge } from "@/components/ui/badge";

export function Example() {
  return (
    <ThemeProvider theme={oneDarkTheme}>
      <Badge variant="info">One Dark</Badge>
    </ThemeProvider>
  );
}
```
